task_objective: Adjust Versions list typography (increase font size to 16px, padding-left 10px), retain 110px label widths, and place the Last Operation timestamp under the message formatted in 12-hour AM/PM
tests_added: Updated static frontend tests in tests/test_frontend_static.py to verify Versions 16px font and 10px padding, 110px label widths, and Last Operation column structure
design_decisions: Kept the manual label width changes at 110px for the Status and Last Operation rows.
Adjusted Versions padding-left to 10px to align it closer to the left margin while keeping the 16px font size.
Implemented a formatTime12h helper in src/index.tsx to convert the ISO 24-hour timestamp into 12-hour format with AM/PM.
Restructured the Last Operation flex-grow container to use flex-direction column, positioning the 12-hour formatted timestamp directly underneath the status message with compact top-margin spacing.
results: All quality control checks (ruff, format, type-check) and all 246 pytest tests pass successfully.
